block.text: You are in the Arcade building. With your robot parked outside. It is a madhouse of sound and coloured lights. Each arcade game is wilder than the next. Which one will you play: Wasp Fighter? Turn to 221 Dinosaur Hunt? Turn to Zap the Karossean? Turn to 393 None Of these? Turn to 165

choice.text: Dinosaur Hunt? Turn to Zap the Karossean?
